case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) VS. OSCAR CARILLO PABLO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,154.14 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT PABLO, OSCAR CARILLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF -FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00- SERVED NOV-26-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PABLO, OSCAR CARILLO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-24-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506; JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY MARILYN NITA--LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA C. HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
REQUEST TO AMEND PARTY NAME BEFORE HEARING (SMALL CLAIMS) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-24-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-21-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CECILIA A. NDOUNDA--LEGAL ASSISTANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DIEGO ROBLES--LEGAL ASSISTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PABLO, OSCAR CARILLO $654.15 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $739.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
